# NewsBoxOne Commit Message Instructions

Use these instructions when generating a Git commit message for this repository.

- Match the existing history with a short, imperative, capitalized subject line.
- Describe the actual staged diff only; do not invent rationale, issue numbers, test claims, or side effects that are not present.
- Prefer the dominant user-visible or maintenance outcome over an implementation detail.
- Mention docs, tests, or tooling in the subject only when they are the main point of the change.
- Keep the subject concise and review-friendly.
- After the subject line, always add at least one additional paragraph that summarizes the main staged changes in plain language.
- Keep the summary paragraph concrete and diff-based; do not invent rationale, validation, or follow-up work that is not present.

Example:

  Redesign app

  Refresh the main layout, update the visual hierarchy across shared surfaces, and adjust component styling to match the new app presentation.
